title: Workhorse and The Truck Shop Secure First Pacific Northwest Municipal Sale
text: Workhorse Group and The Truck Shop secured the first Pacific Northwest sale with a municipal purchase order for two W4 CC electric work trucks from the City of Tacoma. The vehicles, equipped with 16-foot Summit dry van bodies, will be used for trash and recycling can switch-outs. The sale was facilitated through The Truck Shop and procured via Sourcewell, a cooperative purchasing organization. The Sourcewell contract extends until July 9, 2028, with one-year renewal options. As an awarded contract supplier since 2024, Workhorse enables public sector organizations to efficiently source medium-duty electric work trucks, simplifying the transition to sustainable fleet operations. This sale marks Workhorse's entry into the Pacific Northwest region.
